chapter_title: Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: An application for a change in a pilotage rate may be filed with each commissioner of the board by:
a consignee liable under Section 69.070 (Pilotage Rate Liability) to pay pilotage rates;
a party financially responsible for the payment of pilot services.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The application must be written and must state specifically the changes requested.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: The board shall set a hearing date within two weeks of receipt of an application. The hearing may not be set for a day earlier than the 20th day or later than the 40th day after the date the board sets the hearing.

subsections.label: d
subsections.text: An applicant shall give notice of the application and the hearing date, by certified mail to the last known address, to:
all pilots licensed or certified in the port;
all known pilots associations or consignees;
all steamship agencies and associations in the port;
each Jefferson and Orange County port; and
all known users of pilot service within the past 12 months.

subsections.label: e
subsections.text: The board may not increase pilotage rates for the public ports of Beaumont, Port Arthur, or Orange unless the affected board of commissioners approves the increase.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.
